summary: Implemented composition graph infrastructure: ModuleManifest type extension with optional module_dependencies and provider_dependencies fields, DAG construction, cycle detection, deterministic topological sort, composition-aware capability resolution via DAG traversal, snapshot builder integration (topological ordering when dependencies present), module-loader validator updates for dependency fields (I7 enforcement), computeManifestHash inclusion of dependency fields, and set-level composition graph validation (referential integrity + acyclicity + provider satisfaction).

verification.notes: 523 tests total (kernel: 182, module-loader: 144, runtime-host: 197). All 476 existing tests pass unchanged. 47 new tests added. DEP-1, IC-1 through IC-5 all pass.
